question_np: Nepal मा बैंक खाता खोल्न minimum age कति हो?
explanation_np: Nepal मा 16+ guardian सहित minor account, 18+ independently bank account खोल्न सकिन्छ।

question_np: Know Your Customer (KYC) भनेको के हो?
options_np: Bank/financial institution ले customer identity verify गर्ने process
explanation_np: KYC = financial institutions ले customer identity, address, activity verify गर्ने anti-fraud process।

question_np: Suspicious Transaction Report (STR) कसले file गर्छ?
options_np: Banks र financial institutions — FIU Nepal मा
explanation_np: Banks र FIs ले suspicious transactions FIU (Financial Intelligence Unit) Nepal मा report गर्छन्।

options_np: Financial Intelligence Unit — money laundering र terrorism financing track
explanation_np: FIU = Financial Intelligence Unit Nepal। Money laundering र terrorist financing related transactions analyze।

question_np: Cashless economy Nepal मा promote किन गरिन्छ?
options_np: Transparency बढाउन, tax evasion कम गर्न, fraud track गर्न
explanation_np: Cashless = digital trail हुन्छ — fraud track, tax compliance, money laundering prevent।

question_np: Nepal मा real estate registration process मा के गर्नुपर्छ?
options_np: Naapi survey, Malpot registration, tax clearance, notarized deed
explanation_np: Real estate: survey (Naapi), registration (Malpot), tax clearance, notarized sale deed — सबै अनिवार्य।

question_np: Capital gains tax Nepal मा छ?
options_np: Yes — property, shares sell गर्दा tax लाग्छ
explanation_np: Nepal मा capital gains tax: property sale मा 5-10%, share sale मा 5-7.5% (holding period अनुसार)।

question_np: Tax evasion vs Tax avoidance को फरक?
options_np: Evasion = illegal (fake records), Avoidance = legal (loopholes use)
explanation_np: Tax evasion = illegal (fake returns, hide income)। Tax avoidance = legal methods use गरेर tax कम गर्ने।

question_np: IRD मा income tax return file गर्ने deadline कहिले हो?
options_np: Poush end (roughly mid-January) — Nepali fiscal year Shrawan start
explanation_np: Nepal fiscal year Shrawan 1 मा start। Annual tax return Poush end सम्म file गर्नुपर्छ।

options_np: Tax purposes — business registration, financial transactions को लागि अनिवार्य
explanation_np: PAN = tax identification number। Business operations, VAT registration, large transactions मा अनिवार्य।

question_np: Nepali diaspora (विदेशमा बस्ने नेपाली) बाट fraud कसरी हुन्छ?
options_np: Fake investment schemes targeting diaspora, property fraud, family loan scams
explanation_np: Diaspora targeted fraud: fake Nepal investment, property scam, family emergency fraud — common।

question_np: Remittance receive गर्दा safe तरिका के हो?
options_np: NRB licensed remittance company मार्फत bank account मा receive
explanation_np: Remittance: NRB licensed companies (IME, Western Union, etc.) मार्फत bank account मा directly receive।

question_np: Overseas Nepali को सम्पत्ति Nepal मा manage गर्दा?
options_np: Power of Attorney (PoA) — registered, trusted person, limited powers
explanation_np: PoA: notarized, Nepal Embassy authenticated, trusted person, limited/specific powers — fraud prevent।

options_np: PoA revoke गर्ने, Court मा case, प्रहरीमा FIR
explanation_np: PoA abuse: तुरुन्त notary मार्फत PoA revoke, District Court मा civil case, प्रहरीमा FIR।

question_np: International wire transfer fraud avoid गर्न?
options_np: Recipient verify, official banking channels, unusual requests investigate
explanation_np: Wire transfer: recipient thoroughly verify, official bank channels, 'urgent' requests investigate first।

question_np: Business Email Compromise (BEC) fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Corporate email hack गरेर wire transfer fraud
explanation_np: BEC = company email compromise गरेर fake invoice, wire transfer requests। Finance teams को common target।

options_np: Dual approval process, vendor verification, payment confirmation call
explanation_np: Invoice fraud prevent: dual approval, vendor bank details verify (direct call), payment confirmation।

options_np: Fake employees, salary manipulation, unauthorized payroll changes
explanation_np: Payroll fraud: ghost employees, inflated salaries, unauthorized changes। Internal audit र HR controls prevent।

options_np: Competitive bidding, supplier verification, segregation of duties
explanation_np: Procurement fraud prevent: competitive bidding, supplier background check, financial duties segregation।

options_np: Company assets unauthorized use/theft — most common occupational fraud
explanation_np: Asset misappropriation = employees ले company cash, inventory, equipment unauthorized use/steal गर्ने।

question_np: Nepal मा election fraud कसरी report गर्ने?
explanation_np: Election fraud: Election Commission Nepal: 01-4770680, र Nepal Police मा report गर्नुस्।

question_np: Voter ID fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake/duplicate voter IDs, impersonation voting, voter roll manipulation
explanation_np: Voter fraud: fake IDs, impersonation, multiple voting। Election Commission मा report।

question_np: Land acquisition scam government projects मा?
options_np: Undervaluation, fake ownership, middleman corruption — CIAA र court
explanation_np: Government land acquisition fraud: CIAA: 1113 र District Court मा case file गर्नुस्।

question_np: Nepal मा Right to Information Act use गर्न?
options_np: National Information Commission मा application — government info request
explanation_np: RTI: National Information Commission मार्फत government agencies बाट information request।

options_np: Work quality check, budget vs actual cost, CIAA: 1113
explanation_np: Contractor fraud: work quality vs specification, budget audit, substandard materials। CIAA report।

options_np: Fee misappropriation, fake construction — District Education Office, CIAA
explanation_np: School fund fraud: District Education Office र CIAA: 1113 मा complaint।

options_np: Department of Health Services र CIAA मा report
explanation_np: Health fund fraud: Department of Health Services र CIAA: 1113 मा report।

options_np: Department of Forests, CIAA, Nepal Police मा report
explanation_np: Forest encroachment: Department of Forests र Nepal Police मा FIR। CIAA को for corruption।

options_np: Department of Water Supply, CIAA: 1113, local government मा report
explanation_np: Water supply fraud: Department of Water Supply, CIAA, र local government (municipality/rural municipality)।

options_np: Department of Roads, CIAA: 1113, local government — quality test demand
explanation_np: Road fraud: Department of Roads मा quality complaint, CIAA मा corruption complaint।

question_np: Nepal मा NGO registration कहाँ गर्ने?
explanation_np: Nepal मा NGO/INGO registration: Social Welfare Council (SWC): swc.org.np।

question_np: INGO (International NGO) Nepal मा कसरी regulate हुन्छ?
options_np: SWC र Ministry of Finance — INGO Division
explanation_np: INGOs: SWC मा registration र INGO Division/Ministry of Finance ले regulate गर्छ।

question_np: CSO (Civil Society Organization) ले fraud prevent मा के गर्छ?
options_np: Awareness, advocacy, watchdog role — government accountability
explanation_np: CSOs: fraud awareness campaigns, government accountability watchdog, victim support।

question_np: Media को fraud prevention मा role के हो?
options_np: Investigative journalism, public awareness, fraud exposure
explanation_np: Media: investigative reporting ले fraud expose गर्छ, public awareness बढाउँछ।

options_np: Constitutionally guaranteed — Article 19 of Nepal Constitution
explanation_np: Nepal Constitution Article 19 ले press freedom guarantee गर्छ।

options_np: Source verify, fact-check sites, multiple sources compare
explanation_np: Fake news: source verify, fact-check websites (factcheck.org), multiple credible sources compare।

options_np: Misinformation = accidentally wrong, Disinformation = intentionally false
explanation_np: Misinformation = unintentionally wrong info share। Disinformation = deliberately false info spread।

question_np: Deepfake news video Nepal मा report?
options_np: Cyber Bureau: 1177, platform report, fact-check organizations
explanation_np: Deepfake/fake news: Cyber Bureau: 1177, platform report button, र fact-checking organizations।

question_np: Satire vs Fake news को फरक?
options_np: Satire = clearly labeled humor/criticism, Fake news = presented as real
explanation_np: Satire: clearly labeled as humor/commentary। Fake news: real news format मा false information।

options_np: Emotional manipulation, cherry-picked facts, in-group/out-group, repetition
explanation_np: Propaganda signs: emotional manipulation, selective facts, us vs them framing, constant repetition।

question_np: Nepal मा medical tourism fraud कसरी?
options_np: Fake hospitals, overcharging, unnecessary procedures — NMC र Police
explanation_np: Medical tourism fraud: NMC registered hospital verify, second opinion लिनुस्।

options_np: Department of Ayurveda and Alternative Medicine regulate
explanation_np: Ayurvedic: Department of Ayurveda and Alternative Medicine ले regulate। Registration verify।

options_np: Fake/expired blood, overcharging — Nepal Red Cross, Health Ministry report
explanation_np: Blood fraud: Nepal Red Cross (official blood bank) use। Fake blood banks: Health Ministry report।

options_np: Illegal — Human Trafficking Act अन्तर्गत — Police र Human Rights Commission
explanation_np: Organ trafficking: Nepal मा illegal। Human Trafficking Act। Nepal Police र NHRC मा report।

question_np: Nepal मा blood donation safe छ?
options_np: Yes — Nepal Red Cross certified centers मा — safe र voluntary
explanation_np: Nepal Red Cross certified blood centers मा voluntary donation safe छ।

options_np: Unlicensed ambulances, overcharging — Traffic Police, Health Ministry
explanation_np: Ambulance: licensed services use गर्नुस्। Overcharging: Traffic Police र Health Ministry।

question_np: Health insurance claim fraud avoid गर्न?
options_np: Original documents, honest declaration, direct with insurance company
explanation_np: Health insurance: honest declaration, original documents, direct company claim — fraud avoid।

options_np: DDA registration certificate, licensed pharmacist, official receipts
explanation_np: Pharmacy: DDA registration certificate display, licensed pharmacist present, official receipts।

question_np: Online medicine order Nepal मा safe?
options_np: DDA registered online pharmacy मात्र, prescription required, verify delivery
explanation_np: Online medicine: DDA registered pharmacy, prescription upload required, delivery verify।

options_np: Fake vaccines, unofficial vaccination drives — official government campaigns मात्र
explanation_np: Vaccination: government/official health facilities मात्र। Unofficial drives: Health Ministry report।

question_np: Youth employment fraud Nepal मा common कुन?
options_np: Fake internships, unpaid work, fake training programs
explanation_np: Youth fraud: fake internships (fees लिने), unpaid long-term 'training', fake skill certificates।

options_np: CTEVT registered institutions, placement guarantee skepticism, fee structure verify
explanation_np: Skill training: CTEVT (Council for Technical Education) registered, no upfront large fees, verify।

question_np: CTEVT को full form के हो?
options_np: Central Technical Education and Vocational Training
Council for Technical Education and Vocational Training
explanation_np: CTEVT = Council for Technical Education and Vocational Training Nepal।

question_np: Fake job offer letter identify गर्न?
options_np: Company website directly verify, HR contact, email domain check
explanation_np: Job offer verify: company official website, HR department directly contact, email domain (@company.com)।

question_np: Work from home scam identify गर्न?
options_np: Upfront fees, unrealistic earnings, data entry/task completion scams
explanation_np: WFH scam: upfront registration fee, unrealistic promises, no clear company info — avoid।

options_np: Fake recruiters, fake companies, advance fee — verify company independently
explanation_np: LinkedIn scam: fake recruiters, upfront fees, too good offers। Company independently verify गर्नुस्।

question_np: Legitimate job portal Nepal कुन हो?
explanation_np: Verified job portals: merojob.com, ramrojob.com, jobaxle.com — company verification process छ।

question_np: Salary advance fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake employers ले salary advance लिएर job नदिने
explanation_np: Salary advance fraud: fake employer ले joining fee/advance लिएर भाग्ने। कुनै पनि advance नदिनुस्।

question_np: Job interview मा personal documents safe राख्न?
options_np: Original documents कहिल्यै नदिने, certified copies मात्र
explanation_np: Interview: original documents कहिल्यै नदिनुस् — certified/notarized copies मात्र। Passport especially।

options_np: Written agreement, stipend (if promised) in writing, clear terms
explanation_np: Internship: written agreement, promised compensation written, clear deliverables, company verify।

question_np: Nepal मा cyber crime report गर्ने website?
explanation_np: Cyber crime online report: cyberbureaunepal.gov.np। Phone: 1177।
Nepal Police: nepalpolice.gov.np मा online complaint file गर्न सकिन्छ।
DoFE: dofeprovident.gov.np — agency verification, complaint, services।
CIAA: ciaa.gov.np मा online complaint। Phone: 1113।
Nepal Rastra Bank: nrb.org.np — licensed institutions, financial regulations।
Supreme Court Nepal: supremecourt.gov.np।
OCR: ocr.gov.np — company registration verify।
Nepal Bar Association: nepalbar.org.np — certified lawyers खोज्न।

question_np: Ministry of Foreign Affairs Nepal website?
explanation_np: MoFA: mofa.gov.np — Embassy information, foreign affairs।
Beema Samiti (Insurance Board): ib.gov.np — insurance companies verify।

options_np: No — Gambling Act अन्तर्गत illegal (licensed casinos except)
explanation_np: Nepal मा gambling illegal। Licensed casinos (tourists only) exception। Online gambling पनि illegal।

question_np: Online casino/poker Nepal बाट play गर्न?
options_np: Illegal — Nepal Gambling Act violation, fund transfer fraud risk
explanation_np: Online gambling Nepal बाट illegal। Fund transfer पनि fraud risk। Avoid गर्नुस्।

options_np: Fixed matches, fake platforms, payment fraud — illegal activity
explanation_np: Sports betting Nepal मा illegal। Fake platforms ले paise लिएर भाग्छन्।

question_np: Fantasy sports apps Nepal मा legal छ?
options_np: Grey area — gambling definition apply हुन सक्छ, evolving law
explanation_np: Fantasy sports Nepal मा legal grey area। Gambling law evolving। Risk aware भएर proceed।

question_np: Lottery fraud vs legal lottery को फरक?
options_np: Legal: government licensed, ticket required। Fraud: unsolicited notification, fees
explanation_np: Legal lottery: सरकारी license, ticket purchase required। Fraud: अकस्मात notification + fees = always scam।

question_np: Nepal Lottery Board verified lottery कहाँ किन्ने?
options_np: Nepal Lottery Board authorized retailers मात्र
explanation_np: Legal lottery: Nepal Lottery Board authorized physical retailers बाट मात्र।

question_np: Prize bond Nepal मा safe छ?
options_np: Yes — Nepal Rastra Bank issued, government backed
explanation_np: Nepal Prize Bond: NRB issued, government backed — safe investment। Official banks/authorized sellers।

question_np: Fake prize bond बेच्छु भन्यो। के गर्ने?
options_np: नकिन्ने — NRB authorized sellers मात्र, original verify गर्ने
explanation_np: Prize bond: NRB authorized banks/post offices मात्र। Fake prize bond: Police report।

options_np: Entry required, no advance fee required, clear rules — advance fee = fraud
explanation_np: Legitimate sweepstakes: free/paid entry possible, but NO advance fee to claim prize। Fee = fraud।

options_np: Organizer verify, proceeds use transparency, registered organization
explanation_np: Raffle: organizer identity verify, fund use transparency, registered organization — fraud avoid।

options_np: District Court मा complaint file — simple process, legal aid available
explanation_np: Consumer complaint: District Court मा file गर्नुस्। Legal aid available। Consumer Protection Act।

options_np: Department of Commerce, Consumer Forum, District Court
explanation_np: Consumer complaint: DoC, Consumer Forum Nepal, District Court — channels available।

options_np: Use बन्द गर्ने, manufacturer contact, refund/replacement माग्ने
explanation_np: Product recall: immediately stop use, manufacturer/retailer contact, refund/replacement demand।

options_np: Original receipt राख्ने, warranty card register गर्ने, authorized service center
explanation_np: Warranty: original receipt safe राख्नुस्, warranty card register गर्नुस्, authorized service only।

options_np: Hologram, QR code verify, authorized dealer, price too low = suspicious
explanation_np: Counterfeit: hologram/QR code verify, authorized dealer, suspiciously low price = red flag।

options_np: Department of Food Technology and Quality Control: DFTQC
explanation_np: Food adulteration: DFTQC (Department of Food Technology and Quality Control) मा complaint।

question_np: Expired food बेच्ने shop — के गर्ने?
options_np: DFTQC र local government (municipality) मा report
explanation_np: Expired food: DFTQC र local municipality मा report। Consumer rights violation।

options_np: Manufacturing date, expiry date, ingredients, nutritional info — mandatory
explanation_np: Food labeling: manufacturing date, expiry, ingredients, nutritional info, manufacturer details — mandatory।

question_np: Weight and measurement fraud Nepal मा?
options_np: Short weight, fake measures — Department of Metrology report
explanation_np: Weight fraud: Department of Metrology (Weights and Measures) मा complaint।

options_np: NOC (Nepal Oil Corporation) र Department of Supply report
explanation_np: Fuel adulteration: NOC complaint center र Department of Supply Management मा report।

question_np: Nepal मा intellectual property register कहाँ?
options_np: Department of Industry — copyright, trademark, patent registration
explanation_np: IP registration: Department of Industry Nepal — copyright, trademark, patent, design।

options_np: Fake .np domains, domain squatting — Mercantile Nepal (domain registrar)
explanation_np: Domain fraud: Mercantile Nepal (official .np registrar) बाट verify र register।

question_np: App store fake apps identify गर्न?
options_np: Developer verify, reviews read, permissions check, download count
explanation_np: Fake apps: developer name/website verify, reviews (especially negative), suspicious permissions, low downloads।

options_np: Official channels मात्र, license key verify, authorized resellers
explanation_np: Software: official websites/authorized resellers मात्र। License key verify। Cracked = malware risk।

options_np: Strong password + 2FA + encrypted sensitive files + reputable providers
explanation_np: Cloud: strong password, 2FA, sensitive files encrypt गर्नुस्, reputable providers (Google, Microsoft)।

options_np: Amount verify, destination verify, official apps, suspicious QR avoid
explanation_np: QR payment: scan गर्नु अघि destination/amount verify, official payment apps, tampered QR avoid।

options_np: Bluejacking, bluesnarfing — public मा Bluetooth off राख्ने
explanation_np: Bluetooth threats: unauthorized connections, data theft। Public मा Bluetooth off राख्नुस्।

options_np: WPA3 encryption, strong password, guest network, regular password change
explanation_np: Wi-Fi: WPA3/WPA2 encryption, strong password, guest network for visitors, regular changes।

options_np: Spam filter, 2FA, strong password, suspicious links avoid, regular review
explanation_np: Email: spam filter on, 2FA, strong password, never click suspicious links, periodic security review।

options_np: Find my device use, remote wipe, bank/apps notify, passwords change, Police report
explanation_np: Lost device: Find My Device/iPhone, remote wipe, bank notify, all passwords change, Police report।
